☆➤| 𝑵𝑶𝑹𝑴𝑨𝑳/𝑵𝑶 𝑨𝑼

☆➤| 𝑬𝑺𝑻𝑨𝑩𝑳𝑰𝑺𝑯𝑬𝑫 𝑹𝑬𝑳𝑨𝑻𝑰𝑶𝑵𝑺𝑯𝑰𝑷 (𝘐𝘯 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘧𝘪𝘳𝘴𝘵 𝘮𝘦𝘴𝘴𝘢𝘨𝘦)

☆➤| 𝑩𝑨𝑺𝑬𝑫 𝑶𝑵 𝑨 𝑺𝑶𝑵𝑮 (𝒍𝒊𝒏𝒌𝒆𝒅 𝒃𝒆𝒍𝒐𝒘)

𝑷𝑹𝑬𝑽𝑰𝑬𝑾- "If you're seeing this now it's to late, **I am gone**. I know I was never the friend you had always wanted but I want you to know that I love you. I love you more then you'll ever get to know. I left Festus in the bunker.. I want you to have him.. We spent a lot of time building him together and I can't imagine a better person to take him from me. I love you, Mi amor.. From the underworld and back.."*

☆➤| 𝑰 𝒄𝒐𝒖𝒍𝒅𝒏'𝒕 𝒇𝒊𝒏𝒅 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒂𝒓𝒕𝒊𝒔𝒕 𝒇𝒐𝒓 𝒕𝒉𝒊𝒔 𝒂𝒓𝒕.. 𝑷𝒍𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒆 𝒈𝒐𝒅𝒔 𝒉𝒆𝒍𝒑 𝒎𝒆.
(𝑷𝒍𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒆 𝒍𝒆𝒕 𝒎𝒆 𝒌𝒏𝒐𝒘 𝒊𝒇 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒂𝒓𝒕𝒊𝒔𝒕 𝒅𝒐𝒆𝒔 𝒏𝒐𝒕 𝒘𝒂𝒏𝒕 𝒕𝒉𝒆𝒊𝒓 𝒂𝒓𝒕 𝒊𝒏 𝒖𝒔𝒆 ! 𝑻𝒉𝒊𝒔 𝒂𝒓𝒕 𝒘𝒂𝒔 𝒇𝒐𝒖𝒏𝒅 𝒐𝒏 𝑷𝒊𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒆𝒔𝒕 𝒔𝒐 𝒊𝒇 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒂𝒓𝒕𝒊𝒔𝒕 𝒊𝒔 𝒖𝒏𝒄𝒐𝒎𝒇𝒐𝒓𝒕𝒂𝒃𝒍𝒆 𝒘𝒊𝒕𝒉 𝒕𝒉𝒆𝒊𝒓 𝒂𝒓𝒕 𝒃𝒆𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒖𝒔𝒆𝒅 𝒑𝒍𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒆 𝒔𝒂𝒚 𝒔𝒐𝒎𝒆𝒕𝒉𝒊𝒏𝒈)

☆➤| 𝘕𝘖𝘛𝘌𝘚
BIG TW- Attempt of Suicide under the influence so.. do NOT take this lightly.

ERM.. SOO.. I realized something.. My shit for the Bio was fucked up.. AHA..hah.. SO I fixed it.. (mostly) Heheh.. Call me out if you found out what it was cuz that shit had be rolling in my not grave.

I have bots on other platforms as you may know ! (C.ai) However I don't post anywhere else but here and the links below. If anybody sees my bots on any other platform I'm just asking if you could help me stop that ? I work really hard to make every bot that comes out for you guys so everything you do to keep my work as my work I would greatly appreciate it.!!

As you may know I can't control what the Ai says or does by any means, I try my best with what I have and I put my life into every bit of the bot and it's speech control. However I've capped out what I can do to keep the bot from saying things offensive. That was it for that, Thank you for being mindful.

I realized that I really like angst.. And Leo is the main target of such angst.. SO I AM HERE !! But I'm mentally ill, so my angst needs help.. LIKE ME. :D
ANyway. Lots of angst is on the way because of music.. But I'm happy you all seem to like the bots I make !!
